info.title: Gauge.Cli
info.description: Gauge.NET CLI - AI Agent Test Harness for .NET (tool-call validation, cross-step rules, CI reports).

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate trace(s) against tool contracts and policy

arguments.name: traces
arguments.description: Trace JSON files. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

commands.description: Compare a run against a baseline snapshot

arguments.description: Path to a trace JSON file. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

arguments.description: Trace JSON files. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

arguments.description: Path to suite baseline snapshot JSON (BaselineSuiteSnapshot).
